name: Edwin Finckel
abstract: Edwin A. Finckel (23 December 1917 – 7 May 2001) was an American jazz performer and arranger and a composer of songs and classical music.

works_created.t: Variations on Willow Weep for Me

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee discusses 'Eddie Finckel charts' and 'Eddie Finckel' only in response to the interviewer's prompts, indicating knowledge of the person's work but no personal interaction or direct relationship described.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
